prestazioni: LFX 3.6L V6 (engine code: LFR) forced-induction conversion using a Garrett GTX3582R turbocharger with a custom 3.5-inch stainless steel intercooler piping system from Vibrant Performance, paired with a Motec M150 ECU for direct port injection control and boost-by-gear mapping (targeting 12 psi on 93 octane)

Full drivetrain reinforcement via a ZF 8HP70 8-speed transmission swap with a Sonnax billet valve body and a PML deep transmission pan, coupled with a South Bend dual-disc clutch for the AWD transfer case to handle increased torque (estimated 500 lb-ft at the wheels)

Suspension overhaul using KW Variant 5 coilovers with custom valving for the Enclave’s 5-link rear suspension, paired with Eibach Pro-Spacer wheel spacers (20mm front, 25mm rear) and a Whiteline front sway bar (27mm) to reduce body roll during high-speed cornering on 22-inch VMR V710 wheels wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 tires (285/35R22 front, 305/30R22 rear)
estetica: Full Rocket Bunny widebody conversion kit (Enclave-specific, not a rebadge) with carbon fiber fender flares, custom front splitter, and a duckbill rear spoiler, all finished in a custom matte 'Avenir Pearl' wrap with gloss black accents

OEM+ lighting upgrade featuring LUX H8 V4 LED headlights with a Diode Dynamics SS3 Max 6000K fog light retrofit, paired with a custom sequential LED taillight setup from VLEDS (Enclave-specific harness required)

Interior rework with Recaro SR-7 seats (Avenir-specific mounting brackets) wrapped in Alcantara with red contrast stitching, a custom roll cage from Custom Cages (bolt-in, 6-point, TIG-welded), and a Momo Prototipo steering wheel with a quick-release hub for the Enclave’s tilt-adjust column
